registry.comment:

SPDX-License-Identifier: Apache-2.0 OR MIT

enum.name: XR_SPATIAL_CAPABILITY_FEATURE_MARKER_TRACKING_FIXED_SIZE_MARKERS_EXT
enum.comment: Capability feature to allow applications to specify the size for the markers. Corresponding config structure is slink:XrSpatialMarkerSizeEXT

enum.name: XR_SPATIAL_CAPABILITY_FEATURE_MARKER_TRACKING_STATIC_MARKERS_EXT
enum.comment: Capability feature to allow applications to specify if markers are static.
